parameters.content: Mailcheck returns trustRate=10  when it can't contact the mail server. Some block it. Need to see if there's a better or different check than just mxExists?

## E-Mail verifier

### Input
JSON Array of the form 
```json
[
  {
  "firstName": "Jane",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "email": "jane@doe.io",
  "companyName": "Acme",
  "domain": "acme.com"
  }
]
```

Output is the same fields with these added
```
"deliverable" : bool
"isValidFormat" : bool
"updatedFields": [ field list ]
"mxExists": true,
"smtpExists": false,
"isNotSmtpCatchAll": true,
"isNotDisposable":  true,
```

nodes.name: When Executed by Another Workflow
